payload.answer: This may update Sam’s current employer: existing memory says Sam works at Goldman, while the new statement says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. Please choose how to handle it.

Keep both facts, preserving the timeline: Sam previously worked at Goldman and then joined Point72.
Save the new statement separately without changing the existing Goldman memory.
